content:
About#This website is a portfolio for my course work.
It brings together my assignments, reflections, and notes from 13 course sessions. I use this space to document what I work on, what I learn, and how my ideas develop over time.
The purpose of the site is to create a simple overview of my progress throughout the course and present my written work in a clear way.
title: About

content:
Contact#You can add your contact details here later.

title: Contact

content:
My expectations#In this post, I write about my expectations for the elective course.
I hope to learn new ways of working with digital tools, reflections, and creative processes. I also want to develop my understanding through the 13 course sessions and document my progress along the way.
What I hope to gain#I hope this course will help me strengthen both my practical and reflective skills. I want to become better at connecting theory, ideas, and my own experiences in the assignments.
title: Expectations for the Elective Course

content: Topic#This is my first post.
title: Session 1
